MCP_PATH_SECRET.description: The secret path that guards your endpoint. **The default is only safe for the fake-data demo** — replace it with a long random string (`openssl rand -hex 24`, or any [random generator](https://www.random.org/strings/)) before connecting a real Oura account. Leave the Oura fields below empty to just try the demo.

OURA_CLIENT_ID.description: Client ID of your own free Oura app from [developer.ouraring.com/applications](https://developer.ouraring.com/applications). Leave empty for demo mode.

OURA_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Client secret of the same Oura app. After deploying, set its redirect URI to `https://<your-worker-url>/oauth/callback`.
